transcript:
CALLER: Hi, mere paas New India Assurance ki policy hai. Kya aap cashless dete hain unke under?
AGENT: Haan, New India Assurance ke saath hum empanelled hain. Cashless facility available hai.
CALLER: Mujhe CT scan karana hai. Yeh cover hoga?
AGENT: Diagnostic scans jaise CT scan generally cover hote hain, lekin yeh depend karta hai aapki policy ke terms pe. Doctor ka prescription hona zaroori hai claim ke liye.
CALLER: Haan, mere paas hai prescription. Kab aa sakta hoon?
AGENT: Aap weekdays mein anytime aa sakte hain. Scanning department subah 8 baje se shuru hoti hai. Pehle apna insurance card aur prescription lekar reception pe aaiye.
CALLER: Theek hai. Kal aata hoon. Shukriya.
AGENT: Bilkul, kal milte hain!
